response.justification: Nearly two decades of full-stack experience with sustained TypeScript/Node.js and React work in product settings, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, and a strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, custom test frameworks) align closely with the role's core stack and its AI agent requirement. Cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and MongoDB/SQL round out the requirements, though Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python are not explicitly evidenced.
strengths: Long, current full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with MongoDB and AWS
Active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work matching the role's AI requirement
Deep testing culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks and testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin and Python absent; Java exposure appears dated
Significant time in niche ecosystems (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the role's primary stack
